title: 2025-2026: Compromised Machines and Data
description: Sunburst-ready rollup showing which machines, identities, and data movement signals are tied to the modern attack traces.
query: ('Trace ID' = 'trace_clickfix_2026_001' or 'Trace ID' = 'trace_toolshell_sp_001' or 'Trace ID' = 'trace_rmm_2025_001' or 'Trace ID' = 'trace_aitm_token_2026_001' or 'Threat Name' = 'ClickFix Data Exfiltration' or 'Threat Name' = 'AiTM Token Replay' or 'Request URL' like '*spinstall0.aspx*' or 'Command Line' like '*CrashFix*' or 'Process Name' like '*ScreenConnect*' or 'User Name' = 'codeofconduct-reader@corp.example.com') | stats count as Signals by 'Log Source', 'Host Name (Server)', Entity, 'User Name' | sort -Signals

ask_ai_prompts: Which machines and identities are compromised across the modern attack set?
Use the grouped signals to recommend containment order.

falsepositives: Purple-team replay traffic scoped to known trace IDs
